meaning: n.阶梯教室(美作:amphitheater)n.圆形剧场
examples: Looking beyond them, I see we are in a natural stone amphitheatre.
On entering the amphitheatre, new objects of wonder presented themselves.
Finally by the second class, I was excited, immediately came to the amphitheatre.
Outside a crisp winter sun reflects on Plymouth Sound, a stunning amphitheatre of cliffs overlooking the sea.
On the hillside leading down to the cliff face, a swathe of green grass forms a natural amphitheatre.
